step_rationale: Type 1 MI discriminator; reflects altered amino acid catabolism in ischemic myocardium.
mechanism: N-Acetyl-L-leucine differentiates atherothrombotic MI from supply-demand mismatch, reflecting myocardial amino acid remodeling.

references.title: Pseudo-targeted metabolic profile differences between emergency patients with type 1 and type 2 myocardial infarction diagnosed by optical coherence tomography.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
